SEQUENCE.COMMENT: lsWithFail - ls a set of FTP files with a framework FE0533 failure on error

BRANCH.COMMENT: if the required input is not supplied, fail

INVOKE.NAME: sFwTracetransid==$null || sFwTracetransid==''
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE9999 - A trace or transaction id is required

Values.value: FE9999 - A trace or transaction id is required

BRANCH.COMMENT: fail if there was an error

SEQUENCE.NAME: name
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if we are sorting the list by name, just sort dirlist in place

SEQUENCE.NAME: date
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if we are sorting by date, we have to go back to the FTP server and get the MDTM of each file - this obviously adds overhead

LOOP.COMMENT: add the date to each filename, at the front, with output going to dirlistTemp
remove the date from the front of each filename, with output going back to dirlist

SEQUENCE.NAME: size
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if we are sorting by size, we have to go back to the FTP server and get the SIZE of each file - this obviously adds overhead too

LOOP.COMMENT: add the size to each filename, at the front, with output going to dirlistTemp

INVOKE.COMMENT: add a quadrillion to the size

LOOP.COMMENT: remove the size from the front of each filename, with output going back to dirlist

INVOKE.COMMENT: Total files to process=%fileCount% out of %listSize% found

Values.value: Total files to process=%fileCount% out of %listSize% found
